executive_summary: Test Marketing Agency's owner loses 10+ hours weekly to manual reporting, email sorting, lost meeting actions, and design bottlenecks. The owner explicitly prioritises automated client dashboards as the highest-impact fix, which would free strategic time currently consumed by $25/hour compilation work.

pain_points.title: Manual Client Reporting
pain_points.description: Every Monday the owner spends 3-4 hours pulling data from Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and the scheduling tool into spreadsheets for clients. The work is described as 'soul-crushing' and causes the owner to fall behind.

pain_points.title: Lost Meeting Notes & Action Items
pain_points.description: Daily standups and client check-ins lack proper notes. Action items are forgotten, and the owner must chase staff on Slack to confirm what was agreed.

pain_points.title: Email Overload & Noise
pain_points.description: The owner is CC'd on everything and receives roughly 200 emails a day, mostly noise or sales outreach. This consumes about 2 hours of sorting time daily.

pain_points.title: Inefficient Design Workflow
pain_points.description: The senior designer spends 6 hours a week on social media graphics and presentation decks that junior staff should handle. Junior staff lack templates and brand guidelines, so all work routes back to the senior designer.

quick_wins.title: Auto-Pull Client Reporting Dashboards
quick_wins.description: Use no-code automation to connect Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and the scheduling tool so numbers populate automatically for review instead of manual compilation every Monday.

quick_wins.title: AI Meeting Notes & Action Item Tracking
quick_wins.description: Deploy an AI meeting assistant to transcribe daily standups and client check-ins, extract action items, and push them to Slack so nothing is lost and the owner stops chasing staff.

quick_wins.title: AI Email Filtering & Prioritisation
quick_wins.description: Apply an AI-powered email sorter to the owner's high-volume inbox to filter noise and sales outreach, cutting the 2 hours/day currently spent sorting CC'd emails.

quick_wins.title: Canva Brand Kits for Junior Designers
quick_wins.description: Create standardised templates and brand kits so junior staff can produce social graphics and presentation decks without sending everything back to the senior designer.
recommended_tools: Canva Magic Studio (Inefficient Design Workflow) → https://www.futurepedia.io/ai-tool/canva

deeper_opportunities.title: Client Self-Service Portal
deeper_opportunities.description: Build the client portal the owner has wanted for two years, giving clients direct access to automated dashboards and reducing repetitive status requests.

deeper_opportunities.title: Integrated Agency Operations Layer
deeper_opportunities.description: Connect reporting, meeting actions, design requests, and email into a single automated workflow so data flows across tools without manual handoffs.

deeper_opportunities.title: AI-Assisted Business Development
deeper_opportunities.description: Use the freed owner hours for strategy and new business by deploying an AI agent to qualify leads, draft proposals, and manage initial outreach.

tool_recommendations.name: Zapier
tool_recommendations.purpose: Automate tasks by connecting Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and the scheduling tool to eliminate manual data pulling into spreadsheets.

tool_recommendations.name: Fireflies.ai
tool_recommendations.purpose: AI meeting assistant that transcribes standups and check-ins, extracts action items, and integrates with Slack to prevent lost tasks.

tool_recommendations.name: SaneBox
tool_recommendations.purpose: AI-powered email sorter that filters noise and sales outreach, reducing inbox overload from 200 emails a day.

tool_recommendations.name: Canva Magic Studio
tool_recommendations.purpose: AI design platform with templates and brand kits enabling juniors to create social graphics and decks without senior oversight.

tool_recommendations.name: Make
tool_recommendations.purpose: Streamline workflows with intuitive visual automation across numerous apps and processes to handle reporting from multiple data sources.

actions: Connect Google Analytics, Meta Ads and scheduling tool via Zapier to auto-populate client dashboard or spreadsheet
Deploy SaneBox to filter noise and sales outreach from the owner's 200 daily emails
Validate automated report accuracy against previous manual Monday reports
Roll out Fireflies.ai for daily standups and client check-ins with Slack integration for action items
Build Canva brand kit and social media templates so junior staff can self-serve design requests
Document basic design guidelines to reduce senior designer review time
Integrate meeting action items into project management workflow
Scope and prototype client portal for automated reporting access
Review time savings and reallocate owner hours to strategy and business development

researched_tools.description: Automate tasks by connecting 7,000+ apps including Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and scheduling tools to eliminate manual data pulling into spreadsheets.
